SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINNIE CHUNG (EASY TRAVEL INC.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VUONG, ANH LAN $4,667.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,902.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
